name: io.github.aliakhtari78/spotifyscraper
description: Public Spotify data for LLM agents — tracks, albums, artists, playlists, podcasts, lyrics, cover art and previews — with no API key and no OAuth. Read-only.

environmentVariables.name: SPOTIFY_SP_DC
environmentVariables.description: Optional Spotify sp_dc cookie that unlocks the authenticated tools (lyrics, podcast transcripts, account info). Public-metadata tools need no value.
